ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutes" (
  "institute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institute */,
  "institute_name" TEXT /* Name of the institute */,
  "code" TEXT /* Unique code assigned to the institute */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the institute */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the institute */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the institute */,
  "estd" INTEGER /* Year the institute was established */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the institute */,
  "history" TEXT /* History of the institute */,
  "mission" TEXT /* Mission statement of the institute */,
  "vision" TEXT /* Vision statement of the institute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "principals" (
  "principal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each principal */,
  "institute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institute the principal belongs to */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the principal */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the principal */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the principal */,
  "designation" TEXT /* Designation of the principal (e.g., TIC, Principal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("principal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_principals_institute_id FOREIGN KEY ("institute_id") REFERENCES institutes ("institute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institute_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institute type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the institute type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the institute type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institute_locations" (
  "institute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institute */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the institute at the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institute_id", "location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institute_types_mapping" (
  "institute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institute */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institute_id", "type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, principal, staff) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "institute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institute being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the institute */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the institute was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the institute was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_institute_id FOREIGN KEY ("institute_id") REFERENCES institutes ("institute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "institute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institute offering the course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_institute_id FOREIGN KEY ("institute_id") REFERENCES institutes ("institute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculties" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty */,
  "institute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institute the faculty belongs to */,
  "faculty_name" TEXT /* Name of the faculty */,
  "designation" TEXT /* Designation of the faculty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculties_institute_id FOREIGN KEY ("institute_id") REFERENCES institutes ("institute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "institute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institute making the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., bank transfer, credit card) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_institute_id FOREIGN KEY ("institute_id") REFERENCES institutes ("institute_id")
)
